title: margaritaria rhomboidalis
intro: Margaritaria rhomboidalis, also known as the African milkwood or water berry, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Margaritaria rhomboidalis include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as being used to stimulate digestion and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the leaves and roots, which can be infused in water or used as a paste to treat various ailments.
